trade.summary: Among the world's largest bilateral trade relationships. Deeply integrated through EU single market and cross-border supply chains. German industrial exports complement French agricultural and luxury goods.
disputes: Nuclear energy inclusion in EU taxonomy

diplomatic.summary: Franco-German axis is the engine of European integration. Regular bilateral summits under the Aachen Treaty (2019). Occasional friction on defence spending, fiscal rules, and energy policy but always resolved within EU framework.
recent_incidents: Disagreement over EU fiscal framework reform

military.summary: Both core NATO allies and EU defence partners. Joint projects include FCAS next-generation fighter and MGCS tank programme. Occasional industrial competition.

financial.summary: Shared euro currency and deeply integrated capital markets. French and German banks are among the largest mutual investors. Both anchor the European financial system.

energy.summary: Francia exports nuclear electricity to Germania. Germania exports renewable energy surpluses to Francia. Both committed to EU energy transition but differ on nuclear's role.

scientific.summary: Extremely active joint research through EU Horizon programmes, CERN participation, and bilateral university partnerships. Among Europe's most productive research dyads.
